title: Heap finish + ML coding (logistic + k-means)
focus: Median stream + logistic regression + k-means from scratch.

items.label: Implement logistic regression with binary cross-entropy
interviewQuestions: Why is the cross-entropy gradient for logistic regression so clean?
How would you handle numerical instability in the sigmoid?
How do you extend binary logistic to multiclass?

items.label: Implement k-means (Lloyd's) + k-means++ init
interviewQuestions: Walk me through Lloyd's algorithm step by step.
How would you handle empty clusters during iteration?
Walk me through 'find median from data stream' with two heaps.
What's the failure mode of softmax + cross-entropy with class imbalance?
